title: SourceRef
description: A reference to the authoritative source of a claim, record, or evidence item in the CNS. Used as a source-of-truth anchor in evidence packets, graph facts, and relay records. GAIL OS canonical source.

source_id.description: Unique source reference identifier. Must use the 'src-' prefix.

source_system.description: The CNS layer or system where this entity originates.

entity_id.description: Identifier of the referenced entity in its source system.

repo_path.description: Repository path if this source is a code artifact (e.g. 'packages/uaos-core/src/...'). Null for non-repo sources.

ref_value.description: The specific reference value — a commit SHA, branch name, PR number, or record ID.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this source reference was recorded.
